meaning: n.(害虫,盗贼等)群袭,出没,横行
examples: The great Australian rabbit infestation was ecologically devastating.
It contains genes that allow it to resist infestation by the corn borer.
Flea infestation was additionally among the top 10 diagnoses for dogs and cats.
Growing underground, it is prone to infestation by the feathery mottle virus and worms.
The infestation flustered fishermen on the Illinois, 100 years ago the largest inland fishery in America.
